description: This API is the second release of the API that returns real multi-terminal dc line quantities. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr, rval = dcndat_2(name, ibus, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the dc line quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Mode switch dc voltage in kV (Line Quantity).
Active power into dc line at converter bus in MW (Converter Quantity).
Same as ‘PAC’ in units determined by the power output option setting (Converter Quantity).
Reactive power into dc line at converter bus in Mvar (Converter Quantity).
Same as ‘QAC’ in units determined by the power output option setting (Converter Quantity).
dc voltage at converter bus end (Converter Quantity).
dc current (Converter Quantity).
Converter setpoint (Converter Quantity).
Converter angle (Converter Quantity).
Tap setting (Converter Quantity).
Minimum steady-state ALPHA or GAMMA angle in degrees (Converter Quantity).
Nominal maximum ALPHA or GAMMA angle in degrees (Converter Quantity).
Commutating resistance per bridge in ohms (Converter Quantity).
Commutating reactance per bridge in ohms (Converter Quantity).
Apparent ac flow into the dc line in MVA (Converter Quantity).
Same as ‘MVA’ in units determined by the power output option setting (Converter Quantity).
ac current flow into the dc line in amps (Converter Quantity).
ac current flow into the dc line in pu (Converter Quantity).
Primary base ac voltage in kV (Converter Quantity).
Transformer ratio in pu (Converter Quantity).
Maximum tap setting in pu (Converter Quantity).
Minimum tap setting in pu (Converter Quantity).
Tap step in pu (Converter Quantity).
Rectifier margin in pu of desired dc power or current (Converter Quantity).

error_codes.description: Bus not a converter bus of dc line ‘NAME’; ‘RVAL’ unchanged.
No base kV at bus; ‘RVAL’ returned as the per unit current.
